Name: update_postgis_locations
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."postgis_locations" SET "geom" = ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($1), "nullable_geom" = ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($2) WHERE postgis_locations."name" = $3::text RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."name" AS "name", ST_AsGeoJSON(mutation_result."geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "geom", ST_AsGeoJSON(mutation_result."nullable_geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "nullable_geom" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
